title: cyclosorus buwaldae
intro: Cyclosorus buwaldae is a type of fern plant species, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus buwaldae include its ability to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other related issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
